case_title: DM STONE, INC. VS CAPITAL LOCATORS, INC AKA CAPITAL INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO HERMAN WEEKS C/O THE CAPITOL LOCATORS, INC. RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY DM STONE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL LOCATORS, INC AKA CAPITAL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL LOCATORS, INC AKA CAPITAL INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DM STONE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAPITAL LOCATORS, INC AKA CAPITAL INC. $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL LOCATORS, INC AKA CAPITAL INC.
